			exists = market

					exists = c:ARG
					this = c:ARG

				AND = {
					exists = c:PLT
					this = c:PLT
				}
			}
			exists = c:GBR

				c:ARG = {
					is_subject_of = c:GBR

			c:KAZ = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
			coa_def_independent_trigger = yes
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_kazakh_khanate_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:KAZ
			this = c:KAZ
			AND = {
				exists = c:RUS
				c:RUS = {
					NOR = {
						RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
						has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
					}
					OR = {
						has_diplomatic_pact = {
							who = c:KAZ
							type = puppet
							is_initiator = yes
						}
						has_diplomatic_pact = {
							who = c:KAZ
							type = dominion
							is_initiator = yes
						}
						has_diplomatic_pact = {
							who = c:KAZ
							type = protectorate
							is_initiator = yes
						}
					}
				}
			}
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_kazakh_alash_autonomy_RU_ML_ADJ

					state_region = { NOT = { has_variable = district_of_columbia } }
					count < 1
				}

			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_empire_of_korea_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:SCA
			this = c:SCA
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			ruler = {
				has_culture = cu:finnish
			}
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_scandinavia_fennoscandia_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					exists = market
					market.owner = {
					exists = c:ACE
					this = c:ACE
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_ACEH
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_NORTH_SUMATRA
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_SOUTH_SUMATRA
					}
				}
				AND = {
					exists = market
					market.owner = {
					exists = c:JMB
					this = c:JMB
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_ACEH
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_NORTH_SUMATRA
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_SOUTH_SUMATRA
					}
				}
				AND = {
					exists = market
					market.owner = {
					exists = c:SAK
					this = c:SAK
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_ACEH
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_NORTH_SUMATRA
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_SOUTH_SUMATRA
					}
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_sumatra_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					exists = market
					market.owner = {
					exists = c:BLG
					this = c:BLG
					}
				}
				AND = {
					exists = market
					market.owner = {
					exists = c:BNJ
					this = c:BNJ
					}
				}
				AND = {
					exists = market
					market.owner = {
					exists = c:KTI
					this = c:KTI
					}
				}
				AND = {
					exists = market
					market.owner = {
					exists = c:PON
					this = c:PON
					}
				}
				AND = {
					exists = market
					market.owner = {
					exists = c:SMB
					this = c:SMB
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_WEST_BORNEO
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_EAST_BORNEO
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_NORTH_BORNEO
					}
				}
				AND = {
					exists = market
					market.owner = {
					exists = c:STG
					this = c:STG
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_WEST_BORNEO
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_EAST_BORNEO
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_NORTH_BORNEO
					}
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_kalimantan_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:CHC
			this = c:CHC
			coa_def_theocracy_flag_trigger = yes
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_chechnya_imamate_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:CHI
			this = c:CHI
			NOT = { country_has_primary_culture = cu:manchu }
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_empire_of_china_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:CSA
			this = c:CSA
			any_scope_state = { count = 1 }
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_confederate_state_of_america_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:GBR
			this = c:GBR
			NOT = { has_law = law_type:law_council_republic }
			NOT = { has_game_rule = plausible_formable_nations }
			exists = capital
			capital = { state_region = s:STATE_LANCASHIRE }
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_greater_manchester_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:GBR
			this = c:GBR
			coa_def_communist_flag_trigger = yes
			exists = capital
			capital = { state_region = s:STATE_LANCASHIRE }
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_mancunian_commune_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:IDN
			this = c:IDN
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			ruler = {
				has_culture = cu:javan
			}
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_majapahit_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:IDN
			this = c:IDN
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			ruler = {
				OR = {
					has_culture = cu:malay
					has_culture = cu:sumatran
				}
			}
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_srivijaya_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:JAP
			this = c:JAP
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			NOT = { has_variable = meiji_var }
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_japan_shogunate_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:LAN
			this = c:LAN
			owns_entire_state_region = STATE_WEST_BORNEO
			owns_entire_state_region = STATE_EAST_BORNEO
			owns_entire_state_region = STATE_NORTH_BORNEO
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_boni_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					exists = market
					market.owner = {
					exists = c:SRK
					this = c:SRK
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_CENTRAL_JAVA
					}
				}
				AND = {
					exists = market
					market.owner = {
					exists = c:YOG
					this = c:YOG
					owns_entire_state_region = STATE_CENTRAL_JAVA
					}
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_mataram_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:USA
			this = c:USA
			any_scope_state = {
				state_region = { NOT = { has_variable = district_of_columbia } }
				count = 1
			}
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_united_state_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:SUD
			this = c:SUD
			has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_mahdist_state_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:SUD
			this = c:SUD
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_funj_state_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:SCA
			this = c:SCA
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			was_formed_from = DEN
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_scandinavia_kalmar_union_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:ZAI
			this = c:ZAI
			OR = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
			}
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_qasimid_state_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:LOU
			this = c:LOU
			coa_republic_trigger = yes
			NOT = { coa_def_communist_flag_trigger = yes }
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_louisiana_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:LOU
			this = c:LOU
			coa_def_monarchy_flag_trigger = yes
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_new_france_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:LOU
			this = c:LOU
			coa_def_communist_flag_trigger = yes
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_louisiana_commune_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = market
			market.owner = {
			exists = c:LOU
			this = c:LOU
			coa_def_theocracy_flag_trigger = yes
			}
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_archbishopric_of_st_louis_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = DEFAULT_RU_ML_ADJ
	}
}
